entities.name: daimonia
entities.raw_quote: the agency of daimonia… the spirits of their gods… who spoke in their oracles

entities.name: Pythoness
entities.raw_quote: the spirit of Python did in the Pythoness

entities.name: Tertullian
entities.raw_quote: if even magicians produce apparitions and bring into evil repute the spirits of men who are now dead; if they mesmerise boys to obtain an oracular response

entities.name: Apuleius
entities.raw_quote: a boy… gazing upon the reflection of a statue of Mercury in the water, uttered a prophecy of the future

entities.name: mesmerism
entities.raw_quote: mesmerism was also used to produce the temple sleep by the Pagan priesthood; and was one of the most ordinary practices of the ancient magicians

entities.name: Fakirs
entities.raw_quote: voluntary somnambulism is frequent among the Indian Brahmins and Fakirs

entities.name: Cardanus (Gerolamo Cardano)
entities.raw_quote: he could voluntarily place himself in a state of ecstatic insensibility

entities.name: Restitutus
entities.raw_quote: Augustine relates the same thing of a priest called Restitutus

entities.name: Colonel Townshend

attributes.role: subject of medical observation, will-controlled death

entities.raw_quote: could… die at will, by composing himself on his back, and lying in that position for some time

entities.name: electrobiology
entities.raw_quote: persons… being partially mesmerised by some method of exhausting the psychical energy, are made to do various absurd actions

entities.name: hypnotism
entities.raw_quote: 'Hypnotism' is merely a form of 'Electro Biology'… effects consisted of acts due to the presence of a spirit or influence in a person which was not his own

entities.name: familiar spirits
entities.raw_quote: the result of the inhabitation of a familiar spirit, for whose entry the Adept has prepared himself

entities.name: prince of demons

attributes.role: source of demonic pride and power

entities.raw_quote: the spirit which actuates them is that very spirit of pride which we are told was the condemnation of him who is 'the prince of demons'

entities.name: seirim
entities.raw_quote: The word used by Tertullian is 'seirim,' i.e., 'satyrs,' a word used… to denote a certain order of demons

attributes.author: Charles Williams
attributes.relevance: source on ancient magic and spirit invocation

summary: This chunk explores ancient and medieval spirit communication practices, emphasizing the continuity between Pagan necromancy (especially via mesmerism), early Christian critiques (e.g., Tertullian), and later esoteric traditions. It argues that trance states—achieved through gazing, fasting, or self-induction—facilitated possession by daimonia (spirits/demons), with mediums (including boys, virgins, Fakirs) acting as vessels for prophecy, healing, or divination. The text explicitly links mesmerism, electrobiology, and hypnotism to ancient magical rituals and identifies them as modern manifestations of the same spirit-possession framework.
key_passages: mesmerism was also used to produce the temple sleep by the Pagan priesthood; and was one of the most ordinary practices of the ancient magicians
a boy, who was gazing upon the reflection of a statue of Mercury in the water, uttered a prophecy of the future in a hundred and sixty rhythmical lines.
the spirit which actuates them is that very spirit of pride which we are told was the condemnation of him who is 'the prince of demons'
it seems impossible to avoid this conclusion if… the mesmeric trance is due to the temporary possession of the body of a person by a foreign spirit
the phenomena of Mesmerism, 'Electro Biology', 'Hypnotism', and the powers of 'Mediums' and 'Adepts', are merely the reproduction of the phenomena of ancient magic
